channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月23日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 The startup's Postgres survival guide #2 10 REM"_(C2SLFF4 #3 Why I Am Not Going to Buy a Computer #4 OpenAI and Hugging Face address security incident during model evaluation #5 Introduction to Formal Verification with Lean Part 1 #6 I Built a Private Genomics Study with Stoffel MPC #7 Kimi K3 Is Competitive with Fable; Kimi K3 and Fable Is SoTA #8 Drake Anthony Recreates the Mechanical Bulb First Seen in 1675 – TechEBlog #9 Intel Starts Shipping High-NA EUV Silicon #10 Cornell's Interactive Wall of Birds
